title: Your match title shown in the booth
finalScore: Private metadata only. Do NOT announce as live score.
homeJerseyColor: Describe the home kit so the AI can tell teams apart
awayJerseyColor: Describe the away kit so the AI can tell teams apart
playerIdentificationNotes: Tell the AI how to name players: use names only when the shirt number or kit is clearly visible, otherwise use roles.
Describe each team's kit colors so the AI does not mix them up.
broadcastNotes: Set the vocabulary and cadence (short live play-by-play, one sentence).
Describe the situation at the start of your clip.
storyline: One or two sentences describing the moment your clip captures.
